Robbery146_x264: A person wearing dark clothing moves through the aisle toward another individual seated near the front. The person in dark clothing approaches the seated individual, who appears to react by leaning back or moving away. A brief struggle ensues, during which both individuals fall to the floor. Other passengers nearby begin to intervene, with some attempting to separate the two individuals involved in the altercation. As the scuffle continues, more passengers get involved, trying to restrain those on the ground. Eventually, several people manage to pull the individuals apart, though they remain on the floor for a period before being helped up. The overall atmosphere becomes chaotic as multiple people attempt to de-escalate the situation.
Assault042_x264: In the scene, two individuals are seen walking toward each other along a paved area near parked vehicles. As they approach, one person appears to extend their arm or hand toward the other, suggesting a potential interaction or gesture. Shortly after this moment, the individual who extended their arm suddenly falls to the ground, while the other person continues moving forward without stopping. The fallen person remains on the pavement for several moments, with no immediate assistance offered by nearby individuals. A third person walks into view later, observing the situation before continuing on their path. Throughout the event, another person stands still nearby, appearing to watch the unfolding incident. No further intervention occurs during the duration shown, leaving the fallen individual alone on the ground.
Arson041_x264: A person dressed in light-colored clothing stands near a door for an extended period, appearing to interact with the doorknob or handle. They shift their weight and turn slightly, remaining close to the doorway. After some time, they move away from the door and walk toward the left side of the frame before exiting the view. Later, another individual enters the scene, carrying a container, and bends down near the floor. This second person pours liquid from the container onto the ground, creating a noticeable wet patch. The area around the spilled liquid begins to emit smoke, which quickly spreads and fills the space, obscuring much of the view until the camera feed becomes almost entirely obscured by dense smoke.
yt_arson: Two men walk along a paved path at night. One man, wearing a black shirt, stops beside the path and appears to ignite something on the ground next to some bushes. The other man, in a white shirt, continues walking away down the path. Shortly after, the man in the black shirt begins to throw objects onto the ground near the ignited area, causing a bright flash and spreading flames. He then moves back toward the path while continuing to interact with the fire. The camera angle shifts to show the growing fire, which illuminates the surrounding vegetation and smoke. A map overlay indicates the location as Bulgaria. The scene transitions to firefighters working near the blaze, silhouetted against the flames. The footage then cuts to a different incident showing a group of people engaged in a chaotic altercation on a street at night. One person falls to the ground during the scuffle, and others surround them. The video ends with a promotional screen for Channel A.
